word: H829 - אֶשְׁפָּר - ʼeshpâr - esh-pawr' - Good piece

sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׁפּר

Transliteration: 'eshpâr

Phonetic: esh-pawr'

BDB Definition:

  1. piece of meat, measured portion, date-cake (meaning and significance obscure)

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: 182.1

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
